title: Visited Dr. Vijay Rangachari (ENT/ Otorhinolaryngologist) For Sinus / Sinusitis Treatment
text: I had recently undergone nose(left sinus) surgery. I had difficulty breathing through nose due to deviated septum, left sinus filled with mucus and overgrowth of polyp. Since, it was surgery related to nose, we had to be extremely cautious in getting it done ******* *** **** **** *** *******. We consulted different ENT Specialists. Finally, after lot of research, we got the online reference of Dr. Vijay Rangachari, Whitefield Manipal hospital.
